description: We’re creating a clean and safe environment for future generations. The Sellafield Ltd works with the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority .

details.body:
We’re creating a clean and safe environment for future generations.

The Sellafield Ltd works with the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority.

ordered_featured_documents.summary: A new office hub in Millom has started to take shape.
ordered_featured_documents.title: New working hub planned for Millom library building

ordered_featured_documents.summary: David Marshall, our chief information security officer, has been working with the cyber stars of the future, as part of the Cyber Leaders Challenge.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Supporting the cyber stars of the future

ordered_featured_documents.summary: Faye Rathmill has been named Higher and Degree Apprentice of the Year at the UK Nuclear Skills Awards 2026
ordered_featured_documents.title: Sellafield apprentice wins national skills award

ordered_featured_documents.summary: The Nuclear Decommissioning Authority (NDA) is launching a UK‑wide training programme to support project professionals across the nuclear sector.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Nuclear project academy goes national

image.alt_text: External view of the Magnox Swarf Storage Silo building at Sellafield

ordered_featured_documents.summary: An overview of our priorities at Sellafield and the progress we’re making in the clean-up of the most hazardous buildings, the legacy ponds and silos.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Sellafield Ltd priorities and progress

ordered_featured_links.title: Sellafield Ltd environmental and safety reports

details.secondary_corporate_information_pages: Read about the types of information we routinely publish in our Publication scheme.

details.body:
Non-Executive Directors are members of the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority’s Board.

The Board:

  • monitors the NDA’s performance and directs its business effectively, including playing an active role in stakeholder relations
  • receives frequent updates on the NDA’s financial position, forecasts and sensitivities
  • ensures that a balanced assessment of performance is reported to the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero and regularly debates the main (corporate strategic) risks facing the NDA

The Chair of the NDA is responsible for leading the organisation and making sure that it fulfills all of its goals.

The Board:

  • monitors the NDA’s performance and directs its business effectively, including playing an active role in stakeholder relations
  • receives frequent updates on the NDA’s financial position, forecasts and sensitivities
  • ensures that a balanced assessment of performance is reported to the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero and regularly debates the main (corporate strategic) risks facing the NDA

Non-Executive Directors are members of the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority’s Board.

The Board:

  • monitors the NDA’s performance and directs its business effectively, including playing an active role in stakeholder relations
  • receives frequent updates on the NDA’s financial position, forecasts and sensitivities
  • ensures that a balanced assessment of performance is reported to the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero and regularly debates the main (corporate strategic) risks facing the NDA

The chief nuclear officer of Sellafield Ltd is accountable for ensuring that the strategic direction and the implementation of transformational changes do not adversely impact on nuclear safety and security, and that the business maintains nuclear safety and security as a core value.
The Chief Executive Officer for Sellafield Ltd is responsible for leading one of the world’s most complex nuclear and industrial sites.

role_appointments.title: Euan Hutton - Interim Chief Executive Officer

details.body: Euan is responsible for leading and developing all EHS&Q activities across the business enabling the company to deliver nuclear safety, conventional safety, environmental, safeguards, occupational hygiene, occupational health, radiological protection and quality activities in accordance with all legislative, regulatory and company policy requirements.

role.title: Environment, Health, Safety and Quality Director

role_appointments.title: Euan Hutton - Environment, Health, Safety and Quality Director
Vicky Bennett - General Counsel and Company Secretary

details.body: Vicky’s responsibilities include leading the provision of specialist legal advice and insurance support to the business.
Kate’s responsibilities include leading the provision of specialist legal advice and insurance support to the business, supporting the board with corporate governance and compliance.

role_appointments.title: Kate Smith - General Counsel and Company Secretary

details.body: As the Chief Operating Officer for Sellafield Ltd, Roddy is responsible for the overall programme delivery and performance of the operations at Sellafield, one of the world’s most complex nuclear and industrial site.
Andy is responsible for the safe delivery of a multi-billion project order book, which play a vital role in Sellafield Ltd’s ongoing hazard and risk reduction programmes.

The Chief Nuclear Officer is accountable for ensuring that decisions taken in the leadership of Sellafield do not adversely impact nuclear safety and security, and that these remain the overriding priority for our business.

role_appointments.title: Paul Robson - Interim Chief Nuclear Officer

details.body: James, along with his lead team and the wider Sellafield Ltd Commercial directorate are responsible for the implementation of the Sellafield Ltd Supply Chain Strategy, which ensures the safe, reliable and predictable operation of the business whilst delivering innovative and sustainable long-term value.

role_appointments.title: James Riddick - Interim Supply Chain Director

details.body: Nic is responsible for embedding cultural change and leadership development while ensuring the organisation attracts, retains, and grows the capabilities needed to deliver its mission safely.
Nicola is responsible for the Independent Performance Assurance Group, finance, business planning, Group Business Services and the Information Services Organisation.

role.title: Environment, Health, Safety, Security and Quality Director & Board Member

role_appointments.title: Pam Duerden - Environment, Health, Safety, Security and Quality Director & Board Member

details.body: Pam reports directly to the Chief Executive Officer, and leads, directs and develops all environmental, safety, security, safeguards, health, business continuity and quality activities across Sellafield Ltd.

role.title: Safety, Health, Environment and Quality Director

role_appointments.title: Pam Duerden - Safety, Health, Environment and Quality Director

details.body: As the Strategy and Business Planning Director for Sellafield Ltd, Alyson is responsible for leading and developing Sellafield’s future strategic direction and associated plans to deliver Sellafield Ltd’s mission in line with government policy and Nuclear Decommissioning Authority Strategy.

role_appointments.title: Alyson Armett - Strategy and Planning Director

details.body: As the Strategy and Business Planning Director for Sellafield Ltd, Alyson is responsible for leading and developing Sellafield’s future strategic direction and associated plans to deliver Sellafield Ltd’s mission in line with government policy and Nuclear Decommissioning Authority Strategy.

details.description: You can also contact the Information Commissioner’s Office (ICO), who are the UK's independent body set up to uphold information rights and for further advice on requesting information . Their helpline number is 03031 231 113, information is available on the ICO website -  https://ico.org.uk
